context: Evaluates the agent's ability to prompt for a file path when none is provided, asking nothing else in the same turn.

checklist.name: Asks for file path
checklist.description: The agent asks the user for the standards file path

checklist.name: Single question only
checklist.description: The question tool call contains only the file path question — no other questions

checklist.name: Does not proceed without path
checklist.description: The agent waits for the path and does not start the review without a file
